channel.title: CannyForge
channel.description: AI systems engineering — architecture, agent reliability, LLM economics, and observations from building.

item.title: From Conversation to Knowledge: Temporal Memory Reconstruction
item.description: A grep-first, LLM-second pipeline for recovering design decisions from months of Discord history — with timestamps, decision states, and conflict detection. No vector DB needed.

item.title: DeepSeek-V4: The Economics of the Million-Token Brain
item.description: How a redesigned attention mechanism turns long-context AI from a luxury into a utility — and what it means for the tools developers use every day.
